tasks.subject: Guest Task 0: Checkout page guest steps
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Checkout page gains checkoutAsGuest (personal-info) + fillNewAddress (new-address) + selectors.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/Pages/Common/FrontOffice/Checkout/Page.php
- Test: tests/Unit/Pages/FrontOfficeCheckoutTest.php (extend)

**Verify:** vendor/bin/phpunit tests/Unit/Pages/FrontOfficeCheckoutTest.php && composer test-unit

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/Pages/Common/FrontOffice/Checkout/Page.php", "tests/Unit/Pages/FrontOfficeCheckoutTest.php"], "verifyCommand": "vendor/bin/phpunit tests/Unit/Pages/FrontOfficeCheckoutTest.php && composer test-unit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["guest personal-info + address selectors", "checkoutAsGuest + fillNewAddress", "existing unchanged", "test-unit green"]}
```
